name: honeypot-detector
description: A professional smart contract security analysis skill that detects honeypots, rug pulls, and malicious patterns on EVM networks, with first-class support for Pharos.

scripts.check:foundry: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const v=execSync('anvil --version',{stdio:['ignore','pipe','pipe']}).toString().trim();console.log('[HPD] Foundry OK:',v);process.exit(0);}catch(e){console.error('[HPD] Foundry/anvil NOT FOUND in PATH.');console.error('[HPD] The behavioral simulation layer requires Foundry.');console.error('[HPD] Install: curl -L https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash && foundryup');console.error('[HPD] Or set HPD_FORK_MODE=off to skip the simulator layer.');process.exit(1);}"

author: ademidun69
